name: /standards-audit: when COVERAGE.md exists from S-3, audit links to its anchors rather than re-emitting the per-source breakdown
command: echo "# Coverage" > COVERAGE.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit.md" --link-to "$PWD/COVERAGE.md" && grep "COVERAGE.md" audit.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
